title: Hammer of Justice 3D
description: Renaming the mace to "Hammer of Justice" changes it to look like Gerson's weapon from Deltarune!
body:
![The title "Hammer of Justice 3D" on a green gradient background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74670b36a4a86be0a0412ee430cd0d82bab20b8c.png)



So I was playing survival and whacking some sheep with an axe pretending to be Gerson, and then I thought, you know what, this would be a pretty cool resource pack.

So I made this model, and while making it decided it would better fit the mace rather than an axe. It was also after this that I searched up "Hammer of Justice" on Modrinth and saw there was a similar resource pack, but a 2D texture, so I just slapped on the "3D" title.

The model turned out SUPER well, and it looks genuinely really cool!

________________________________________________________________________________________________
![The text: "How to Use"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0700bc5423a75e2cfba1a86f7eef45866f04fe3d.png)

Take a Mace, put it in an anvil, and rename it to: "Hammer of Justice", without the "". It's that easy!

________________________________________________________________________________________________
![The text: "Requirements"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea161b5830df8fc8f27c84850a0803c12b2e8cd0.png)

Despite using [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) while making this, I believe due to newer updates (1.21.6+), you can use this with ZERO mods! Just put it in your resource packs folder and enable it!
